condition_notes: Sega's isometric leap — bank over the fortress walls and through the force field. Zaxxon for the Atari 8-bit (1984), full-color label, a desirable Sega title. Loose, used, untested; from a single-owner estate. Loose cartridge (no box/manual); Atari 8-bit COMPUTER version, NOT the 2600 cart. Used and untested — sold as-is.
